# v2.2.1 — Enterprise-Scale Cloud Scanning

Scan an entire AWS Organization, Azure tenant, or GCP project hierarchy in a single session. Includes automatic retry, checkpoint/resume for interrupted scans, per-record-type DNS breakdown, and expanded resource coverage across all three cloud providers.

## Multi-Account / Multi-Subscription / Multi-Project Scanning

- **AWS** — discovers all accounts in an AWS Organization via cross-account AssumeRole; per-account failures are non-fatal
- **Azure** — auto-discovers and scans all subscriptions in the tenant concurrently
- **GCP** — discovers all projects in an org hierarchy via recursive folder traversal

## Retry & Reliability

- Automatic retry with exponential backoff on rate limiting (429) and transient errors (5xx)
- Configurable concurrency per provider via Advanced Options (default: 5 parallel accounts/subscriptions/projects)

## Checkpoint / Resume

- Interrupted multi-account scans resume from where they left off — completed units are not re-scanned

## DNS Record Type Breakdown

- Per-record-type rows (`A`, `AAAA`, `CNAME`, `MX`, `TXT`, `SRV`, …) instead of a single aggregate
- Applies to AWS Route53, Azure DNS, and GCP Cloud DNS

## Expanded Resource Coverage

### AWS — 7 new resource types
- **Internet Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **NAT Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **Transit Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **VPN Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **Customer Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **Elastic IP** — Active IPs
- **IPAM Pool**, **VPC CIDR Block**, **Route53 Resolver Endpoint** — DDI Objects

### Azure — 7 new resource types
- **Application Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **NAT Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **Azure Firewall** — Managed Assets
- **VNet Gateway** — Managed Assets
- **Virtual Hub** — Managed Assets
- **LB Frontend IP**, **VNet Gateway IP** — Active IPs
- **Public IP** — DDI Objects

### GCP — 4 new resource types
- **Forwarding Rule** (load balancer frontend) — Managed Assets
- **Internal Range** — DDI Objects
- **GKE Cluster CIDR**, **Secondary Subnet Range** — DDI Objects

## Notes

- AWS org scanning requires `organizations:ListAccounts` on the management account and a cross-account role with read permissions in each child account
- GCP org scanning requires `resourcemanager.projects.list` and `resourcemanager.folders.list` on the org-level service account
- GCP GKE cluster counting requires the `container.viewer` role — degrades gracefully to 0 if absent
- Single-account/subscription/project mode is unchanged — org scanning is opt-in via a new auth method

## Download

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| Windows | `uddi-token-calculator_windows_amd64.exe` |
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `uddi-token-calculator_darwin_arm64` |
| Linux | `uddi-token-calculator_linux_amd64` |
